title: capability plan schema
description: Language-agnostic contract for the bridge's routing plan: one primary capability route, zero or more fallback routes, confidence, and authority requirements. See Sources/CapabilityBridge/CapabilityPlan.swift and Sources/CapabilityBridge/Routing.swift for the Swift reference implementation.

taskFrameRef.description: Reference to the TaskFrame this plan was produced for.

fallbackRoutes.description: Ordered list of fallback routes for graceful degradation.

authorityRequired.description: Authority gates that must be satisfied before execution.

tracePolicy.description: Policy controlling trace emission for this plan (e.g. emit-all).

estimatedRiskTier.description: Risk tier estimated by the planner for the selected route.

reason.description: Human-readable explanation for why this route was selected.
